SL_InOut_AccountingDate.description: Auto-fill accounting date from movement date. Source not found — classic UI only, backend handles date defaulting.
SL_InOut_AccountingDate.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set accounting date; backend default still applies on save.

SE_InOut_Organization.description: Organization change cascade. Source not found — classic UI only.
SE_InOut_Organization.impactIfOmitted: No cascade on organization change; acceptable for simplified UI.

SE_InOut_DocType.description: Document type change cascade. Source not found — classic UI only.
SE_InOut_DocType.impactIfOmitted: No cascade on document type change.

SL_InOut_BPartner.description: Auto-fill partner address from business partner. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_InOut_BPartner.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually select partner address after choosing business partner.

SE_InOut_Warehouse.description: Warehouse change cascade. Source not found — classic UI only.

SL_InOutLine_Product.description: Auto-fill UOM and storage bin from product. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_InOutLine_Product.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set UOM and storage bin after selecting product.

SL_InOut_Conversion.description: UOM conversion calculation for order UOM / operative quantity. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_InOut_Conversion.impactIfOmitted: UOM conversion not auto-calculated in UI; backend handles on save.

OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity.description: Converts operative quantity to base quantity. Source not found — classic UI only.
OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity calculated by backend on save.

SL_LandedCost_Cost_Type.description: Auto-fill amount and distribution algorithm from landed cost type. Source not found — classic UI only.
SL_LandedCost_Cost_Type.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually fill amount and algorithm after selecting cost type.

SL_LandedCost_InvoiceLine.description: Auto-fill from invoice line selection. Source not found — classic UI only.

VAL_DocType_MaterialReceipt.description: Filters document type selector to material receipts/shipments matching transaction direction (IsSOTrx).
VAL_DocType_MaterialReceipt.impactIfOmitted: Users could select wrong document types (e.g., invoices instead of receipts).

VAL_BPartnerLocation_ShipTo.description: Filters partner address selector to ship-to locations of the selected business partner.
VAL_BPartnerLocation_ShipTo.impactIfOmitted: Users could select irrelevant addresses from other business partners.

VAL_User_BPartnerContact.description: Filters user/contact selector to contacts of the selected business partner.
VAL_User_BPartnerContact.impactIfOmitted: Users could select contacts from other business partners.

VAL_User_OrgTree.description: Filters company agent selector to users in the organization hierarchy.
VAL_User_OrgTree.impactIfOmitted: Users could select agents outside their org tree.

VAL_Project_StatusAndBPartner.description: Filters project selector to open/ordered projects for the selected business partner.
VAL_Project_StatusAndBPartner.impactIfOmitted: Users could select closed or unrelated projects.

VAL_DeliveryLocation_ShipTo.description: Filters delivery location to ship-to addresses of the selected business partner.
VAL_DeliveryLocation_ShipTo.impactIfOmitted: Users could select non-ship-to delivery addresses.

VAL_Org_ShowChildren.description: Filters organization selector to child organizations in the hierarchy.
VAL_Org_ShowChildren.impactIfOmitted: Users could select organizations outside their accessible tree.

VAL_Locator_ByWarehouse.description: Filters storage bin selector to bins belonging to the header warehouse.
VAL_Locator_ByWarehouse.impactIfOmitted: Users could select storage bins from wrong warehouses.

VAL_UOM_ForProduct.description: Filters alternative UOM to valid UOMs for the selected product.
VAL_UOM_ForProduct.impactIfOmitted: Users could select UOMs not applicable to the product.

VAL_DocType_LandedCostCost.description: Filters landed cost document type to LCC base type documents.
VAL_DocType_LandedCostCost.impactIfOmitted: Users could select wrong document types for landed cost.

READONLY_Processed_Header.description: Most header fields become read-only when document is processed (Processed=Y). Covers: documentNo, movementDate, businessPartner, partnerAddress, warehouse, priority, deliveryTerms, deliveryMethod, companyAgent, charge, documentType, chargeAmt.
READONLY_Processed_Header.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit fields on confirmed receipts, breaking data integrity.

READONLY_Posted_AccountingDate.description: Accounting date becomes read-only when document is posted (Posted=Y).
READONLY_Posted_AccountingDate.impactIfOmitted: Users could change accounting date on posted documents.

READONLY_BPartner_HasLines.description: Business partner becomes read-only when processed OR when receipt has existing lines (HAS_M_INOUTLINES=Y).
READONLY_BPartner_HasLines.impactIfOmitted: Users could change business partner after lines are added, causing inconsistency.

READONLY_Processed_Lines.description: Line fields become read-only when parent header is processed. Covers: lineNo, product, storageBin, movementQty, uOM, orderUOM, orderQty, attributeSet, alternativeUOM, operativeQty.
READONLY_Processed_Lines.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit lines on confirmed receipts.

READONLY_UomManagement_Qty.description: Movement quantity and UOM become read-only when UOM management is active (UomManagement=Y) — managed by the operative quantity field instead.
READONLY_UomManagement_Qty.impactIfOmitted: Users could override quantity/UOM that is controlled by operative UOM management.

READONLY_LandedCost_Processed.description: Landed cost fields become read-only when header is completed (HeaderStatus=CO) or processed. Covers: landedCost, landedCostType, amount, distributionAlgorithm, currency, invoiceLine, lineNo.
READONLY_LandedCost_Processed.impactIfOmitted: Users could modify landed cost records after completion.

DISPLAY_InvoicedQty_WhenProcessed.description: Invoiced quantity is only shown when header is processed (Processed=Y).
DISPLAY_InvoicedQty_WhenProcessed.impactIfOmitted: Invoiced quantity always visible even on draft receipts.

DISPLAY_AttributeSet_WhenApplicable.description: Attribute set value shown when product has attribute set and value type is not fixed, or when an instance already exists.
DISPLAY_AttributeSet_WhenApplicable.impactIfOmitted: Attribute set selector shown for all products regardless of configuration.

DISPLAY_OrderUOM_WhenApplicable.description: Order UOM shown only when product has secondary UOM or UOM management is active.

DISPLAY_OperativeQty_WhenNoOrderUOM.description: Operative quantity shown when product has no order UOM.

DISPLAY_Dimensions_WhenEnabled.description: Accounting dimensions (project, costcenter, asset, stDimension, ndDimension, activity, trxOrg) shown only when accounting dimension display is enabled (ACCT_DIMENSION_DISPLAY).
DISPLAY_Dimensions_WhenEnabled.impactIfOmitted: Dimension fields always visible regardless of system configuration.

PROCESS_ProcessShipment.description: Process Shipment action button (DocAction/Processing). Classic process button — not applicable to simplified UI.
PROCESS_ProcessShipment.impactIfOmitted: Users process the receipt through backend/workflow, not through this UI.

PROCESS_CreateLinesFrom.description: Create Lines From hardcoded process. Classic UI picker — not applicable.
PROCESS_CreateLinesFrom.impactIfOmitted: Lines must be added manually or through a separate flow.

PROCESS_GenerateInvoice.description: Generate Invoice from Receipt. Classic process button — discarded field.

PROCESS_InvoiceFromShipment.description: OBUIAPP Invoice From Shipment action handler. Not applicable to simplified UI.
PROCESS_InvoiceFromShipment.impactIfOmitted: Invoice generation handled through separate workflow.

PROCESS_LandedCostMatching.description: Landed Cost Matching Process and Cancel Matching OBUIAPP processes. Complex costing actions — not applicable.
PROCESS_LandedCostMatching.impactIfOmitted: Landed cost matching managed through dedicated costing UI.

PROCESS_ManagePrereservation.description: Manage Prereservation Pick and Edit. Stock reservation management — not applicable.
PROCESS_ManagePrereservation.impactIfOmitted: Pre-reservation managed through dedicated stock UI.

PROCESS_Explode.description: Explode BOM process. Field discarded in curated schema.
PROCESS_Explode.impactIfOmitted: BOM explosion not available in simplified UI.
